epigraph.quote: The campsite smells beautiful of damp vegetation + cows.

per_stop.quote: The Gondola brought us back. I have never been in such a comfortable, fast, quiet small boat.
We drove over Wrynose Pass, steep, huge drops, into Wrynose Bottom
We had lunch at the top of steep cliffs next to the fort, looking out at Scarfell Pike.
over a beautiful packhorse bridge with deep cool rock pools on either side.
We drove up to Wast Water & walked in the village, seeing St. Olaf's tiny church where climbers are buried & drystode walls of the farm.
an amazing camp site with a meandering stream, bog & field
Coleridge visited + fell in love with Anne, inspite of being married himself, which Wordsworth regarded as an "inconvenience."
There is amazing carved oak furniture in all the rooms - clocks, beds, wainscoats, bookcases.
